reviews_data.review_text: Adorable spot, such sweet workers, the pastries were delishhh and INSANE lattes. The tiramisu is like a dessert coffee and every sip is so good. The peanut butter latte blew my mind, truly don’t understand how she creates these. Will definitely be going back to try more.

This place is amazing!! The owner is super nice and welcoming!! I got an iced white chocolate churro coffee, cinnamon cheesecake and a blueberry muffin. Everything tasted wonderful!! What a GEM! You must go by Lia Bakery! I will go back soon.

First time coming in to this new bakery! My daughter and I each got a latte- she got a churro latte and I got the toasted marshmallow. Both were delicious! The atmosphere is charming and I will enjoy dining in my next trip!

Its a new location here in Kannapolis, NC
Food is delicious 🤤 the cheese Danish was super! I definitely want to come back and try out the rest of the menu.
They also have a crane machine for kids to play and wins toys, wow what a great atmosphere.
What a delight. Wonderful people, bakery and (mocha) coffee. Nothing better than supporting a local business. Can't wait to come back.
Great service! Friendly atmosphere and excellent coffee and pastries! We highly recommend Lia bakery 🥯 For more tips follow us on Google maps and Facebook @ John Cauble 🤟😎
I love this bakery. It’s my second time coming here. I love the coziness of the place. I love how the bakery has a theme for every month. ❤️
Amazing Amazing cozy place to hang out with ur friends and chill, the service is also really nice their very cheerful and lively!!
came here for the second time with friends and the workers are so so sweet and remembered us from last time. They’re so respectful and friendly, if you have a chance you should definitely go!
So many options and all of them are good! Great service- please check them out!
Cutest shop with very friendly staff, nice family, with very delicious coffee and treats.

The decor inside is so cutee! The workers were super kind and the chocolate chip croissants are so good. Coffees taste great and overall just a nice experience. Have been multiple times and not once have been let down.
I didn't expect the pastries to be store bought from Sam's Club. But the prices are extremely reasonable.
Absolutely love this bakery!!! The service was amazing and everything was so delicious. This place is truly a gem and can’t recommend it enough!😊

Very cute bakery, seems like a family runs it and were very friendly.
Pastries look and taste delicious! We got frappes and they were just the right amount of sweetness while still having a good coffee flavor.
Prices are good and I will be back to try the empanadas!
Ambiente muy agradable, todo muy delicioso. Personal amable y atento.
Really cute place with excellent pastries and friendly service.

My Husband and I came around 7pm because I was craving a pastry. We were greeted and helped very quickly. I got a pistachio croissant & my husband got the guava pastry. I took a small bite before we got home but once we got home I heated them up in the microwave and that definitely changes things!

I would recommend the pastries are served warm. We would come back. I would like to have chocolate with pistachios but that’s a personal preference.
I purchased coffee from them this morning and they were the sweetest ladies. The coffee tasted SO good! Would 100% recommend!

Lia Bakery is honestly a hidden gem. The moment you walk in, it smells incredible — fresh bread, pastries, everything. The staff is super friendly and actually pays attention, which makes the whole place feel welcoming. Their pastries are soft, flavorful, and always fresh. The croissants are crazy good, and their desserts taste like they’re made with real care. Prices are fair for the quality, too. If you’re looking for a place that never misses, Lia Bakery is definitely it.

Very clean, Very kind staff, and VERY delicious desserts. We got the sponge cake, croissant, and a slice of cake!  I was only able to get a pic of the croissant and sponge cake because we ate the cake too fast lol 😂 look at the layers of deliciousness on that croissant! They even heat up the croissant for us 💕
Barnd new bakery. The chocolate crescent is very good.

Milkshake was really good and presentation cute with the macron on top. We got tres leches cake, boyfriend says it’s amazing. Didn’t realize it had nuts on top and in it so I wasn’t able to try it with my nut allergy. Just wished this was mentioned or advertised on the display or by employees
I really like the place really good food

¡Todo delicioso! Las empanadas están increíbles, el café tiene un sabor único y delicioso, y la atención es excelente. Se nota que preparan todo con cariño. Sin duda, uno de mis lugares favoritos en Kannapolis. ¡Muy recomendado! ☕🥐
Delicious coffee and treats! Great customer service and welcoming atmosphere. (:
Awesome bakery and coffee spot! I got a large assortment of her pastry’s and my staff loved them. Will be back!
Un lugar tranquilo para ir a tomarse un cafecito ❤️

So excited about this new place!! I am always looking for guava and cheese pastries, and theirs are *chef’s kiss*! I also highly recommend their tiramisu iced coffee. We had to take our order to go, but I wish we had time to stay because their shop is so cute and clean, and the seating looks super comfortable. The family was also very friendly and inviting, definitely people I would love to support! We will definitely be back soon!

Cute decor! Mocha coffee was perfect. I got the guava and cheese pastry, that was delicious and not overly sweet my daughter loved her pumpkin tres leches! We split a chocolate donut to try and it was a really good old fashioned donut. First visit didn’t disappoint at all

WOW!! The food and drinks were amazing! We got the cherry raspberry lemonade, tiramisu iced coffee, chocolate mousse, and chocolate macaron. Everything was delicious! The inside was so cute—love the pink walls. The staff were very sweet and friendly. I’ll definitely be coming back!

This little coffee shop in Kannapolis is so cute. Everything inside is beautiful and clean. The staff were super nice and helpful. My husband and I each got a late and we shared a donut for less than $12. Everything was delicious and we will definitely be going back.
AMAZING, best customer service, tasty food !!! Love it
Un excelente lugar para disfrutar de un buen café y con una excelente atención
Un lugar hermoso y muy buena atención excelente la experiencia
Authentic bakery! The pumpkin tres leches cake was excellent! Very fresh
